candidates.label: Nano Hero Candidate
candidates.prompt:
Usage:
Create a photorealistic homepage hero image for a Taiwanese industrial automation company website.

Scene:
Show a modern industrial automation main control room with multiple SCADA and HMI displays, a disciplined engineering environment, and credible control-system context. The room should feel operational and real, not futuristic fantasy.

Composition / Camera:
Use a wide 16:9 frame for a website hero. Keep the primary visual weight in the center-left to center area and preserve usable negative space for headline and CTA overlay. Camera should feel slightly elevated or eye-level, with clean perspective and no fisheye distortion.

Materials / Lighting:
Use realistic glass, metal, matte console surfaces, and softly glowing control screens. Lighting should feel calm, premium, and dependable, with controlled contrast and no dramatic nightclub colors.

Brand Tone:
Professional, reliable, high-trust industrial B2B. Sophisticated and technical. Clean, modern, and grounded in real automation delivery work.

Avoid:
No science-fiction styling, no fantasy interfaces, no visible brand logos, no readable UI text on screens, no warning tape aesthetics, no chaotic wiring mess, no excessive orange cinematic flare, no exaggerated cyberpunk lighting, no watermark, no collage layout.

Output:
Generate a high-quality photorealistic hero image with a polished but realistic industrial atmosphere, suitable for a corporate website. The final composition must remain usable behind white headline text and a primary CTA button.
candidates.notes: Reference-assisted validation rerun after API permission update.

candidates.label: Nano Hero Candidate
candidates.prompt:
{
  "asset_type": "homepage hero image",
  "business_context": "Rally Technology, a Taiwanese industrial automation and control systems company",
  "goal": "Create a photorealistic, commercially usable B2B website hero image that looks real, modern, restrained, and trustworthy",
  "reference_usage": {
    "image_1": "preserve the overall room composition, spatial rhythm, and website-safe framing",
    "image_2": "optional material or lighting reference only"
  },
  "scene": "A real industrial control center behind glass, with a clean integrated monitoring wall and modern engineering consoles",
  "subject": "The room itself is the hero. One operator may appear only as a subtle scale cue, never as the main subject",
  "reality_anchors": [
    "glass-partitioned control room",
    "credible SCADA-style monitoring wall",
    "matte metal and composite console surfaces",
    "modern industrial interior architecture",
    "restrained, realistic process-control UI language"
  ],
  "composition": {
    "format": "16:9",
    "hero_safe_area": "reserve the right side as clean negative space for website headline and CTA",
    "focal_structure": "one primary focal point in the left-center, one secondary depth layer, no clutter",
    "camera": "architectural interior photography, eye-level or slightly elevated, realistic wide-angle perspective",
    "cropping": "designed for a modern homepage hero, not a stock photo crop"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "style": "premium commercial interior photography",
    "mood": "calm, confident, high-trust, modern industrial",
    "contrast": "controlled and realistic",
    "surface_behavior": "clean reflections, no plastic AI sheen"
  },
  "commercial_constraints": [
    "must feel suitable for a modern B2B technology website",
    "must be photorealistic",
    "must support white headline text overlay",
    "must avoid visual clutter",
    "must not feel like concept art or synthetic office stock"
  ],
  "avoid": [
    "futuristic HUD overlays",
    "floating circuit graphics on glass",
    "generic fake analytics dashboards",
    "random whiteboards or fake engineering sketches",
    "crowded desks dominating the frame",
    "too many office chairs as visual focus",
    "cyberpunk glow",
    "cartoonish rendering",
    "soft fake textures",
    "obvious AI artifacts"
  ]
}
candidates.notes: v2 structured JSON prompt with reference-assisted rerun after prompt research

candidates.label: Nano Hero Candidate
candidates.prompt:
{
  "asset_type": "homepage hero background image",
  "business_context": "Rally Technology, a Taiwanese industrial automation, SCADA, PLC, and industrial data integration company",
  "page_role": "Homepage hero image",
  "goal": "Create a premium, photorealistic B2B hero background that feels modern, industrial, trustworthy, and directly usable on a corporate website",
  "visual_message": "A disciplined industrial control center with contemporary automation credibility, atmospheric depth, and a clean headline-safe composition",
  "recipe_ids": [
    "hero-background-right-safe-area",
    "industrial-realism-anchors",
    "technical-signal-stack",
    "color-material-control"
  ],
  "reference_usage": {
    "image_1": "preserve the overall room rhythm, camera height, and website-safe framing",
    "image_2": "optional material, control-wall, or lighting realism reference only"
  },
  "technical_signals": {
    "lens": "35mm architectural interior photography",
    "aperture": "f/3.5",
    "light_source": "soft premium interior lighting with restrained monitor glow",
    "time_of_day": "late afternoon neutral interior mood",
    "motion_rule": "scene should feel still and operational, no dramatic motion blur"
  },
  "spatial_positioning": [
    "main monitoring wall sits left-of-center",
    "right side remains open as clean architectural negative space",
    "foreground glass partition adds depth without blocking readability",
    "one subtle operator may appear only as a small scale cue"
  ],
  "visual_standard": "premium architectural interior photography with corporate technology website discipline",
  "color_restriction": "restrained industrial neutrals, charcoal, matte graphite, muted steel, controlled cyan or green screen accents only; no purple neon wash",
  "material_notes": [
    "matte metal consoles",
    "glass partitions with believable reflections",
    "composite workstation surfaces",
    "screen glow without plastic sheen"
  ],
  "scene": "A real industrial automation main control room with a credible SCADA and HMI monitoring wall, calm engineering atmosphere, and layered architectural depth",
  "subject": "The control environment is the hero. Any human presence must remain secondary and understated",
  "reality_anchors": [
    "glass-partitioned control room",
    "credible process monitoring wall",
    "modern industrial interior architecture",
    "realistic engineering workstation layout"
  ],
  "composition": {
    "format": "16:9",
    "hero_safe_area": "reserve the right side as empty negative space for future website headline and CTA overlay",
    "focal_structure": "one dominant monitoring-wall focal point with one supporting depth layer",
    "camera": "architectural interior photography, eye-level or slightly elevated",
    "cropping": "designed for a modern homepage hero background, not a generic stock crop"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "style": "premium commercial interior photography",
    "mood": "calm, high-trust, modern industrial, atmospheric but restrained",
    "contrast": "controlled and realistic",
    "surface_behavior": "clean reflections and believable monitor glow, no plastic AI sheen"
  },
  "commercial_constraints": [
    "must feel suitable for a refined B2B technology homepage",
    "must be photorealistic and commercially credible",
    "must support white headline and CTA overlay",
    "must not contain embedded text, buttons, or website UI",
    "must avoid clutter and exaggerated sci-fi aesthetics"
  ],
  "avoid": [
    "generic office stock photography",
    "futuristic HUD overlays",
    "floating circuit graphics",
    "fake SaaS dashboard screens",
    "crowded desks dominating the frame",
    "excessive chairs or people as the focus",
    "cyberpunk purple-blue lighting",
    "headline text, readable words, or numbers",
    "obvious AI artifacts"
  ]
}
candidates.notes: Pro baseline round 1 for homepage-wide compare, calibrated v4 prompt
